Name: Hostingway
Description: For venue managers to track guests and sync information with staff, manage death roll tournaments, create shout templates, and more. Contact author at Mikenno on Discord for any assistance.
Punchline: A utility tool for venue managers.
Author: The Warrior of WHAT
Changelog:
1.4.1.0 
 - Greetingway: Users can now Add Target or click a button in the columns that allows you to add/remove that person as a VIP. Their name will be purple if they're a VIP, and will turn white (standard) once greeted. 
 - Settings: Subsectioned Greetingway settings. Added a new greeting section for VIP-only greetings, as well as bulk-add VIPs. 
 1.4.2.0 
 - Settings: VIP list now sorts alphabetically 
 - Payingway: Now with Dropbox integration. If Dropbox is not installed, fallback is /trade <t> 
 - Deathway: Reset Current Match added 
 Contact Mikenno @ Discord for any other features or bugs ♥
